check_script_lines: "if($fc){$fc|Select-Object InstanceName,@{N='PortState';E={switch($_.Attributes.PortState){1{'Unknown'}2{'Operational'}3{'User Offline'}4{'Bypassed'}5{'Diagnostics'}6{'Link Down'}7{'Port Error'}8{'Loopback'}default{$_.Attributes.PortState}}}},HBAStatus|Format-Table -Auto}else{'No FC HBA port-state data exposed by driver.'}; "

"if($ev){$ev|Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\\r?\\n',' ')}}|Format-Table -Wrap -Auto}else{'No HBA/port offline-online-like events found in the last 30 days.'}"
message='Windows HBA 로그 점검 명령 실행에 실패했습니다.',
message='HBA 포트 또는 이벤트 로그 점검 결과가 비어 있습니다.',
keyword for keyword in failure_keywords if keyword.lower() in text.lower()
message='HBA 로그 결과에서 실패 키워드가 확인되었습니다.',
lines = [line.rstrip() for line in text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
no_initiator_ports = 'No HBA initiator ports exposed.' in text
no_fc_port_state = 'No FC HBA port-state data exposed by driver.' in text
no_hba_events = 'No HBA/port offline-online-like events found in the last 30 days.' in text
'No FC HBA port-state data exposed by driver.',
'No HBA/port offline-online-like events found in the last 30 days.',
if port_state and port_state not in ('operational', 'loopback'):
if hba_status and hba_status not in ('hba_status_ok', 'ok', '0'):
message='HBA 포트 상태 또는 HBAStatus가 정상 범위를 벗어났습니다.',
message='최근 30일 내 HBA 관련 경고/오류 이벤트가 기준치를 초과했습니다.',
operational_port_count = sum(1 for entry in fc_port_entries if entry['port_state'].lower() == 'operational')
loopback_port_count = sum(1 for entry in fc_port_entries if entry['port_state'].lower() == 'loopback')
reasons = 'HBA 포트 상태와 최근 30일 이벤트 로그를 점검한 결과 이상 징후가 없습니다.'
if no_initiator_ports and no_fc_port_state and no_hba_events:
reasons = 'HBA initiator 및 FC 포트 상태 정보는 노출되지 않았지만 최근 30일 내 HBA 관련 경고/오류 이벤트는 확인되지 않았습니다.'
reasons = '일부 HBA 포트 정보는 노출되지 않았지만 최근 30일 내 HBA 관련 경고/오류 이벤트는 확인되지 않았습니다.'
message='Windows HBA 로그 점검이 정상 수행되었습니다.',

results.reasons: HBA initiator 및 FC 포트 상태 정보는 노출되지 않았지만 최근 30일 내 HBA 관련 경고/오류 이벤트는 확인되지 않았습니다.
results.raw_output:
[점검 단계 1]
 - 실행 명령어: '==Initiator Ports=='; $ip=Get-InitiatorPort -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($ip){$ip|Select-Object InstanceName,ConnectionType,NodeAddress,PortAddress|Format-Table -Auto}else{'No HBA initiator ports exposed.'}; '==FC Port State=='; $fc=Get-CimInstance -Namespace root\wmi -Class MSFC_FibrePortHBAAttributes -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($fc){$fc|Select-Object InstanceName,@{N='PortState';E={switch($_.Attributes.PortState){1{'Unknown'}2{'Operational'}3{'User Offline'}4{'Bypassed'}5{'Diagnostics'}6{'Link Down'}7{'Port Error'}8{'Loopback'}default{$_.Attributes.PortState}}}},HBAStatus|Format-Table -Auto}else{'No FC HBA port-state data exposed by driver.'}; '==Recent HBA Events=='; $ev=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Where-Object{$_.Message -match '(?i)\bhba\b|fibre channel|fiber channel|\bfc\b|loopback|link down|port.+offline|port.+online'}; if($ev){$ev|Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}}|Format-Table -Wrap -Auto}else{'No HBA/port offline-online-like events found in the last 30 days.'}
 - 명령 종료코드: rc=0 (정상 종료)
 - 출력 내용: ==Initiator Ports==
No HBA initiator ports exposed.
==FC Port State==
No FC HBA port-state data exposed by driver.
==Recent HBA Events==
No HBA/port offline-online-like events found in the last 30 days.
raw_output_lines: - 실행 명령어: '==Initiator Ports=='; $ip=Get-InitiatorPort -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($ip){$ip|Select-Object InstanceName,ConnectionType,NodeAddress,PortAddress|Format-Table -Auto}else{'No HBA initiator ports exposed.'}; '==FC Port State=='; $fc=Get-CimInstance -Namespace root\wmi -Class MSFC_FibrePortHBAAttributes -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($fc){$fc|Select-Object InstanceName,@{N='PortState';E={switch($_.Attributes.PortState){1{'Unknown'}2{'Operational'}3{'User Offline'}4{'Bypassed'}5{'Diagnostics'}6{'Link Down'}7{'Port Error'}8{'Loopback'}default{$_.Attributes.PortState}}}},HBAStatus|Format-Table -Auto}else{'No FC HBA port-state data exposed by driver.'}; '==Recent HBA Events=='; $ev=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Where-Object{$_.Message -match '(?i)\bhba\b|fibre channel|fiber channel|\bfc\b|loopback|link down|port.+offline|port.+online'}; if($ev){$ev|Select-Object -First 50 TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}}|Format-Table -Wrap -Auto}else{'No HBA/port offline-online-like events found in the last 30 days.'}

results.message: Windows HBA 로그 점검이 정상 수행되었습니다.
